languages.text: "Погонщик Кошмаров обкалывает трупы какой-то эссенцией. Что вам об этом известно?"

traits.locale_text: "Погонщик Кошмаров обкалывает трупы какой-то эссенцией. Что вам об этом известно?"
"Погонщик Кошмаров обкалывает трупы какой-то эссенцией. Что вам об этом известно?"

languages.text: "Nightmare Driver is injecting bodies with some kind of essence. Do you know anything about it?"
languages.original_text: "Погонщик Кошмаров обкалывает трупы какой-то эссенцией. Что вам об этом известно?"

traits.locale_text: "Nightmare Driver is injecting bodies with some kind of essence. Do you know anything about it?"
"Nightmare Driver is injecting bodies with some kind of essence. Do you know anything about it?"
"Nightmare Driver is injecting bodies with some kind of essence. Do you know anything about it?"

languages.text: "Nightmare Driver injiziert Leichen eine Art Essenz. Wisst ihr etwas darüber?"
languages.original_text: "Nightmare Driver is injecting bodies with some kind of essence. Do you know anything about it?"

languages.text: "Le conducteur du cauchemar injecte une sorte d'essence dans les corps. Savez-vous quelque chose à ce sujet ?"
languages.original_text: "Nightmare Driver is injecting bodies with some kind of essence. Do you know anything about it?"

languages.text: "梦魇驾驶员" "正在给人体注射某种精华" "Nightmare Driver is injecting bodies with some kind of essence.你知道吗？"
languages.original_text: "Nightmare Driver is injecting bodies with some kind of essence. Do you know anything about it?"

languages.text: "El Conductor Pesadilla está inyectando cuerpos con algún tipo de esencia. ¿Sabes algo al respecto?"
languages.original_text: "Nightmare Driver is injecting bodies with some kind of essence. Do you know anything about it?"

languages.text: "ナイトメアドライバーはある種のエッセンスを身体に注入している。何か知っていますか？"
languages.original_text: "Nightmare Driver is injecting bodies with some kind of essence. Do you know anything about it?"

languages.text: "Kabus Sürücü bedenlere bir tür öz enjekte ediyor. Bu konuda bir şey biliyor musun?"
languages.original_text: "Nightmare Driver is injecting bodies with some kind of essence. Do you know anything about it?"
